🎖️ Harpy
🔧 Class
Tinker (Ambush)
Level
9 (225 XP)
Status
Active
Power
Builds reality-warping musical devices.
Background
They act much more childish then their age should suggest.
Profile
Age: 22
v1.1 Systems
Stress: 3/100
Trait lean: Balanced (no bias either way)
Traits
• Reserved — favors stealth entry in heists; main detail in protection
• Stubborn — double weight in op trait-votes
Bio
Got his start in Menagerie, but after incessant complaining and a firmly rebuffed campaign to convince them to change the wallpaper in their HQ, decided it was best to part ways and find a new crew to roll with.
Base Stats
👊 STR 4 | ❤️ VIT 3 | ⚡ UTL 9★ | ⌚ CTR 7◆ | 🎯 TEQ 4
Total: 27 (23 innate)
Effective Stats (with gear/feats)
👊 STR 8 | ❤️ VIT 9 | ⚡ UTL 9 | ⌚ CTR 8 | 🎯 TEQ 3
Loadout
Weapon: empty
Costume: Mecha Suit (Cap 3)
Gadget: empty
Capacity: 3/4
Feats (4)
• Prototype — +3 UTL on round 1, then -1 UTL afterwards.
• Overload — +3 STR but takes +1 extra damage when hit.
• Prepper — +1 item capacity slot.
• Underdog — +2 STR against higher-health targets.
Unused feats (10) — rolled, not yet activated
• Scavenger — On a winning op, chance to salvage a scrap-tier weapon from the wreckage — equipped to the squad cape with an empty slot, or stashed in the armory.
• Improvisation — +1 UTL every other round.
• Rebound — +2 TEQ when counterattacking.
• Counter — +2 UTL versus a chosen class.
• Menacing — Successful defenses drop attacker's STR by 1.
• Lunge — Ignores up to 5 CTR differential against previously hit targets.
• Pin — Hits reduce the victim's CTR by 2.
• Adrenaline — +1/2 STR when below half health.
• Ego — +2 STR at max health.
• Positioning — +1 CTR on next 3 rounds.
Use /feat_activate to set one.
🔧 Research Unlocked
Combat, Cycle, Mitigation, Ambush ← active, Artillery
Use /tinker_research to switch.
Image
ID: 559 | Bench
